title: HPCET 2026 Registration Open – Apply Now for B.Tech, B.Pharmacy, MBA & More

detail.title: HPCET 2026 Registration Open – Apply Now for B.Tech, B.Pharmacy, MBA & More
detail.short_info: HPCET 2026 registration is open until April 19 on himtu.ac.in. Apply for B.Tech, B.Pharmacy, MBA, MCA & more. Download prospectus PDF, check eligibility, exam dates (May 9-10), step-by-step guide & FAQs.

sections.heading: HPCET 2026 Registration Open – Apply Now for B.Tech, B.Pharmacy, MBA & More

content.text: HPCET 2026 registration began on March 13 and closes on April 19, 2026 – apply online at https://counselling-hptu.hp.gov.in/ for admissions to Himachal Pradesh Technical University (HPTU) programs.

The Himachal Pradesh Common Entrance Test (HPCET) provides entry to professional UG and PG courses at HPTU-affiliated institutes. Conducted offline on May 9-10, it focuses on subjects like Physics, Chemistry, and Math for tech programs.
This table summarizes essentials for quick reference, drawn from official announcements.​
Separate papers apply for PG courses like MBA/MCA.
Apply early to avoid issues; no extensions expected.

Eligibility varies by course – generally 10+2 with 45% for B.Tech/B.Pharmacy (40% for reserved). Check full details in the prospectus PDF, as specifics like age or subject requirements apply (e.g., PCM for B.Tech). HPTU verifies at counselling.

sections.heading: How to Apply for HPCET 2026 – Step-by-Step Guide

items: Click "New Registration" and enter personal/contact details to get a form number.
Log in, fill academic/program preferences, and upload documents (photo, signature).
Pay the fee online (amount per prospectus).

content.text: Use a stable connection; keep form number safe for future logins.

sections.heading: How to Download HPCET 2026 Prospectus PDF

content.text: This PDF has fees, syllabus, and rules – read before applying.​
